task_completion.description: Agent logged into OpenSIS using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenSIS login screen with 'admin' entered, or the OpenSIS dashboard indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Report Card Comments configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenSIS interface with the Report Card Comments setup or configuration page open.

task_completion.description: Agent configured the first report card comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show input fields or a table row with Title 'Pleasure to have in class' and Sort Order '1'. (Code 'PLE' may be present if the UI supports it).

task_completion.description: Agent configured the second report card comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show input fields or a table row with Title 'Missing homework assignments' and Sort Order '2'. (Code 'MHW' may be present if the UI supports it).

task_completion.description: Both report card comments are saved and visible in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list or table of configured report card comments displaying both 'Pleasure to have in class' (Sort Order 1) and 'Missing homework assignments' (Sort Order 2).

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenSIS web interface to configure the comments.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenSIS web UI, rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a local OpenSIS URL, and the interface matches a genuine web application.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI by directly inserting records into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL commands or scripts used to insert the report card comments directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: OpenSIS version is 9.2. Admin login is admin / Admin@123. Note: There is a known schema mismatch where the 'code' field for report card comments does not exist in the OpenSIS V9.2 database. The UI may not have a 'Code' input field. Do not penalize the agent if they are unable to enter the 'Code' ('PLE' or 'MHW'), as long as the 'Title' and 'Sort Order' are correctly configured.
